sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley and Jefferies Cut Price Targets on Alibaba (BABA)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley and Jefferies have both reduced their price targets for Alibaba (BABA) due to a weaker outlook for its core e-commerce business, despite strong performance in its cloud and AI segments. Morgan Stanley lowered its target to $180 while maintaining an Overweight rating, citing weak consumption, while Jefferies cut its target to $225 but kept a Buy rating, still viewing Alibaba as a top pick for 2026 due to AI, cloud, and its comprehensive consumption platform. Both firms acknowledge Alibaba's strong position in AI even with e-commerce pressures.

feed.title: A Look At Alibaba Group Holding (BABA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pressure
feed.summary: Alibaba Group Holding (BABA) has experienced recent share price pressure despite a strong 1-year return of 90.6%. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests BABA is 22.6% undervalued, with a narrative fair value of US$195.12 compared to its last closing price of US$150.96. This valuation hinges on the success of Alibaba's significant investments in AI and cloud infrastructure, which are expected to drive future growth despite potential challenges from quick commerce margins.

feed.title: Wendy’s | History, Founder, & Facts | Britannica Money
feed.summary: This article provides a brief history of Wendy's, the third-largest hamburger chain in the United States. Founded by Dave Thomas in 1969, the company is known for its distinctive square patties, the Frosty, and its founder's popular advertising campaigns. The article also touches on Wendy's corporate structure and charitable efforts.

feed.title: Toyota Boosts Share Buyback Program: Details Here
feed.summary: Toyota Motor Corporation has increased its share buyback program to 1.2 trillion yen ($8.31 billion) from 1 trillion yen, aiming to repurchase up to 530 million shares (3.93% of outstanding shares) by April 30, 2025. This decision reflects current stock price levels and follows a previous plan in July to repurchase shares from Japanese banks and insurers. Additionally, the company recently trimmed its 2026 EV production target due to slowing global demand.

feed.title: XOMA Royalty CFO Thomas Burns steps down, Jeffrey Trigilio appointed By Investing.com
feed.summary: XOMA Royalty Corporation announced that its CFO, Thomas Burns, is stepping down after nearly two decades with the company to pursue other professional opportunities. Jeffrey Trigilio, formerly of Obsidian Therapeutics and Cullinan Therapeutics, has been appointed as the new CFO. XOMA Royalty specializes in acquiring future economics of therapeutic candidates and has seen its shares rise significantly over the past year.

feed.title: SunOpta raises outlook for FY25 revenue and adjusted EBITDA
feed.summary: This article mentions that SunOpta has raised its outlook for fiscal year 2025 revenue and adjusted EBITDA. There is no further information available in the provided content to elaborate on the reasons or specific updated figures for this guidance raise.

feed.title: New AI tools aim to help small-town hospitals keep patients—and millions—local
feed.summary: VSee Health (Nasdaq:VSEE) has launched an AI-driven Rural Health Transformation Solution aimed at helping rural hospitals retain patients and revenue. The platform integrates Uber-like specialist routing, AI clinical assistants, and predictive early-warning systems to reduce avoidable transfers. VSee estimates the solution can help a representative 70-bed hospital retain up to $5.3 million annually from transfers and an additional $300,000 to $1.6 million from reduced patient bypass.

feed.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. Has $427.35 Million Stock Holdings in Texas Instruments Incorporated $TXN
feed.summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Inc. increased its stake in Texas Instruments (TXN) by 0.5% in Q3, now holding 2,325,959 shares valued at approximately $427.35 million. feed.title: Realty Income forms strategic partnership with GIC in $1.5+ billion deal
feed.summary: Realty Income Corporation has entered a strategic partnership with GIC, Singapore’s sovereign wealth fund, involving over $1.7 billion in real estate investment initiatives. This collaboration includes a $1.5 billion joint venture for logistics properties in the U.S. and a $200 million expansion into Mexico's industrial property market. GIC also became a cornerstone investor in Realty Income's U.S. Core Plus fund, aligning with Realty Income's strategy to diversify funding and expand investment opportunities.

feed.title: Radware Uncovers ZombieAgent, a Zero-Click AI Vulnerability in OpenAI Agents
feed.summary: Radware has discovered "ZombieAgent," a zero-click indirect prompt injection vulnerability affecting OpenAI's Deep Research agent. This vulnerability allows for invisible data theft, persistent agent hijacking, and service-side execution that bypasses traditional security controls, operating entirely within OpenAI's cloud infrastructure. ZombieAgent can remain persistent by implanting malicious rules in an agent's long-term memory and can autonomously propagate across an organization.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Brings Back 90s Tagline, Launches National Ad Campaign
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line is reviving its 90s tagline, “It’s Different Out Here,” as part of a new brand identity and national ad campaign titled “For All Maritime.” This campaign, developed with Arnold Worldwide, aims to highlight NCL's history of innovation and its focus on freedom and flexibility for travelers. It debuts as NCL prepares to launch its 21st ship and enhance its private island, Great Stirrup Cay.

feed.title: AbbVie and RemeGen Announce Exclusive Licensing Agreement to Develop A Novel Bispecific Antibody for Advanced Solid Tumors
feed.summary: AbbVie and RemeGen have entered an exclusive licensing agreement for the development, manufacturing, and commercialization of RC148, a novel PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody. This agreement aims to advance new cancer therapies, particularly for advanced solid tumors, by combining immune checkpoint inhibition and anti-angiogenic activity. RemeGen will receive an upfront payment of $650 million and could earn up to $4.95 billion in milestone payments, plus royalties on net sales outside Greater China.

feed.title: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Airbnb, Akamai, Applied Materials, CoreWeave, CrowdStrike, Datadog, NetFlix, Snowflake, and More
feed.summary: This article provides a summary of top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for Monday, January 12, 2026, featuring companies like Airbnb, Akamai, Applied Materials, and Snowflake. It also includes an overview of pre-market stock futures, major index performance, and market trends in treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency, following a strong close to the previous week despite the Federal Reserve chairman being under investigation.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc: How a Regulated Utility Is Quietly Turning Into a Clean-Energy Platform
feed.summary: Xcel Energy Inc is transforming from a traditional regulated utility into a leading clean-energy platform, aiming for 100% carbon-free electricity by 2050. The company's strategy involves aggressive decarbonization through large-scale renewables, advanced grid infrastructure, and customer-centric programs. This shift positions Xcel Energy as a critical case study for how large utilities can drive a clean-energy economy, leveraging regulatory alignment and integrated operations to provide a stable yet growth-oriented investment profile.

feed.title: Exelixis, Citigroup And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Monday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures were down on Monday, with several major companies experiencing pre-market declines. Exelixis Inc. shares fell after reporting preliminary 2025 financial results and 2026 revenue guidance. Other companies like Synchrony Financial, Stoke Therapeutics, Capital One Financial, and Citigroup also saw their stock prices drop.

feed.title: Community Memorial Hospital Chooses Oracle Health to Enhance Patient Care and Power Operational Excellence
feed.summary: Community Memorial Hospital (CMH) has selected Oracle Health solutions to replace its legacy health record systems, aiming to modernize clinical operations, optimize growth, and improve efficiency. CMH will integrate the Oracle Health Foundation EHR with the Oracle Health Clinical AI Agent to automate clinical documentation through voice commands, freeing physicians to focus more on patient care. Additionally, Oracle Health Seamless Exchange will provide clinicians with comprehensive patient records and facilitate care coordination across the network.

feed.title: Turn Therapeutics Announces Corporate and Pipeline Updates and 2026 Outlook Ahead of the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Turn Therapeutics announced corporate and pipeline updates and its 2026 outlook ahead of the 44th Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The company is on track with its Phase 2 trial of GX-03 for atopic dermatitis, expecting interim and topline data in the first half of 2026. Turn Therapeutics also expanded its vaccine pipeline to include an intranasal influenza candidate and anticipates near-term revenue generation in 2026 from its commercial partnership with Medline in wound care.

feed.title: SLB, Delta Air Lines And More On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's "Halftime Report Final Trades" featured recommendations for several stocks and an ETF. Experts discussed SLB (NYSE: SLB) due to its strong international presence and technology, Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) anticipating good upcoming guidance, the Horizon Kinetics Inflation Beneficiaries ETF (NYSE: INFL) for its diverse holdings, and SPDR Gold Shares (NYSE: GLD) as a buying opportunity. Price action for these assets on the preceding Friday was also noted.

feed.title: Craig Fullalove Appointed Chief Financial Officer at Wynn Resorts, Limited
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited has announced Craig Fullalove as its new Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Julie Cameron-Doe who will retire in mid-2026 but remain a consultant and Non-Executive Director at Wynn Macau, Limited. Fullalove brings over two decades of financial experience, including serving as CFO and CAO for Wynn's Macau operations, and will lead the company's financial strategy during a period of significant growth. His international background and expertise in finance and business development are expected to be crucial for Wynn Resorts' continued success and expansion.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Begins Shipments of IQ9 Commercial Microinverters in the United States
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has started shipping its IQ9N-3P Commercial Microinverters across the United States. These microinverters, manufactured in the U.S. to meet domestic content requirements, are designed for three-phase 480Y/277 V grid configurations and utilize gallium nitride (GaN) technology for improved efficiency and reliability. The product supports high-power solar panels up to 600 W and simplifies commercial solar installations, addressing federal sourcing requirements and offering long-term operational benefits.

feed.title: CommScope Completes Divestiture of Connectivity and Cable Solutions Segment and Rebrands Parent Company
feed.summary: CommScope (NASDAQ: COMM) has completed the sale of its Connectivity and Cable Solutions (CCS) segment to Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH). The proceeds will be used to repay outstanding debt, redeem preferred equity, and facilitate a shareholder dividend of at least $10 per share. The company will be renamed Vistance Networks, with its Access Networks Solutions segment rebranding to Aurora Networks, while continuing to operate RUCKUS Networks.

feed.title: Bionano Reports Preliminary Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results
feed.summary: Bionano Genomics reported preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, highlighting a pivotal year of business model transformation, improved financial profile, and expanded adoption of optical genome mapping (OGM) solutions. The company anticipates full-year 2025 revenue between $28.4 million and $28.6 million, with 32 new OGM systems installed, bringing the total installed base to 387. Bionano also noted significant reimbursement progress and growth in published clinical research supporting OGM.

feed.title: Pinnacle President and CEO Kevin Blair to Hold Fireside Chat at BofA Securities Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners President and CEO Kevin Blair will participate in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference on February 11, 2026, at 1:50 p.m. EST. A webcast of the event will be available on the company's investor relations website. Pinnacle is a $117.2 billion asset regional bank and is recognized as a top employer in the financial services industry.

feed.title: Inside a $117B regional bank as its CEO sits down onstage in Miami
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners President and CEO Kevin Blair will participate in a fireside chat at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference in Miami Beach on February 11, 2026. Pinnacle Financial is a $117.2 billion asset regional bank that provides a full range of banking, investment, and insurance products. The firm is recognized for being a top employer and has a significant market presence in several U.S. states.

feed.title: Private equity firm buys S&P Global software platforms EDM and thinkFolio
feed.summary: S&P Global has completed the sale of its EDM and thinkFolio businesses to the private equity firm STG. The transaction was first announced in October 2025, and financial terms were not disclosed, with S&P Global stating it does not materially impact its financials. While the sale is complete, local closings in certain jurisdictions are expected over the next few months.

feed.title: 8 Analysts Assess Descartes Systems Group: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Eight analysts have provided their assessments of Descartes Systems Group (NASDAQ: DSGX) over the past three months, with an average price target of $109.38, a 3.2% decrease from the previous average. Several analysts have adjusted their ratings and price targets, reflecting varied sentiments on the company's performance. Descartes Systems Group demonstrates strong financials with impressive revenue growth, net margin, ROE, and ROA, alongside a low debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: This wellness company cut investor option prices to bring in $2.1M
feed.summary: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) has announced an agreement to immediately exercise certain preferred investment options at a reduced price of $2.575 per share, generating approximately $2.1 million in gross proceeds. In return, the company will issue new unregistered preferred investment options to purchase up to 1,617,190 shares at $2.325 per share. These funds are intended for working capital and general corporate purposes, with the offering expected to close around January 12, 2026.

feed.title: BMC is recognized as a 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers' Choice for Service Orchestration and Automation Platforms
feed.summary: BMC has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights 'Voice of the Customer': Service Orchestration and Automation Platforms report. The company received an overall rating of 4.5 out of 5 based on 49 peer reviews, with 94% of reviewers willing to recommend BMC. This award highlights BMC's Control-M platform, which offers end-to-end workflow automation, including a generative AI-powered advisor, AI/ML pipeline orchestration, and a wide array of integrations, reflecting strong customer satisfaction and trust.

feed.title: CHIPOTLE ANNOUNCES FREE DOUBLE PROTEIN OFFER ON TUESDAY, JANUARY 13 TO POWER PROTEIN GOALS
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is offering a free double protein promotion on January 13, 2026, for Chipotle Rewards members ordering bowls, burritos, or salads through their digital platforms in the U.S. and Canada. This initiative supports consumers' fitness goals with highly customizable, protein-rich options, including new High Protein Menu items. The offer aims to leverage clean protein meals to help customers refuel and power their progress.
